# Compilation Report

## GitHub Actions Workflow Execution Details
- Run ID: N/A
- Status: Failure
- Duration: N/A

## Compilation Status
- FAILURE

## List of Generated Files
- No files generated due to failure in triggering GitHub Actions workflow.

## Detailed Error Analysis
- The GitHub Actions workflow could not be triggered due to a 404 Not Found error.
- The error message indicates the requested workflow was not found in the repository.
- This prevented any compilation or build process from starting.

## Fixes Applied
- No code modifications or fixes were applied as the compilation process did not start.

## Summary
- The compilation did not occur because the GitHub Actions workflow dispatch event failed.

## Next Steps / Recommendations
- Verify that the GitHub Actions workflow file exists in the repository under the correct path.
- Ensure the workflow file name and reference are correct in the trigger API call.
- Check repository permissions and authentication tokens used to trigger the workflow.
- Manually trigger the workflow from the GitHub Actions UI to confirm availability.
- Once the workflow is correctly triggered, re-run the compilation process.
